teacher_notes: Interdisciplinary projects must be carried out at school between April and September.
Carryover of project to home is strictly avoided.
Projects/models should be made from eco-friendly products without incurring too much expenditure.
Project report can be handwritten or digital.
Records for internal assessment/project work should be kept for three months after result declaration (or longer if subjudice/RTI cases).
Use of Govt. of India website maps is permitted.
Art integration must be used in project work.
Rubrics for interdisciplinary projects: Content accuracy/originality (2), Competencies/Presentation (2), Viva-Voce (1).
